message:
fix(durability): replace silent numeric casts with try_from, surface pre-recovery snapshots in logs, and add durability surface matrix golden test

Defensive hardening of the SQLite durability and recovery subsystem:

**Safe numeric casts (pool.rs):**
Replace as-u64 casts with u64::try_from(...).unwrap_or(0) to prevent
silent truncation on negative or oversized values in recovery metrics.

**Pre-recovery snapshot observability (pool.rs, startup_checks.rs):**
Promote _snapshot/_pre_snapshot (previously discarded values) to real
bindings logged via tracing::info!. Recovery events now actually surface
in logs instead of being silently dropped.

**Dead code cleanup (forensics.rs, archive_anomaly.rs, atc_replay.rs):**
Remove unused MetadataExt import, unused HashMap import, rename loop
variable to _i. Fix database_url_redacted test expectation to match
actual redacted form.

**Durability surface matrix golden test (golden_snapshots/):**
New golden snapshot encoding the contract that all five operator
surfaces (cli, server, web, robot, tui) must report identical
durability state, policies, and recovery facts. Pins the "healthy,
no degradation, VerdictEngine as transition authority" baseline —
any surface drift will be caught by comparison against this snapshot.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
